violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in dry storage/cooler area need painted.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean cooler door in back storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more thorough cleaning in back kitchen area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors need repainted in back storage area.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
